items.title: Las Vegas Summer League is now over for the Pacers, finishing 2-3. A 91-73 win over the Pelicans to close it out.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Las Vegas Summer League is now over for the Pacers, finishing 2-3. A 91-73 win over the Pelicans to close it out.

- 22-4-3-4b from Jalen Slawson, the standout performer
- Braden Smith with 5pts, 9asts
- Taelon Peter had 14-4-2
- Kawamura led them with 12a off the bench

items.title: A dominant second half (+24) for the Fever in a 108-88 win over the Liberty. Wins on back-to-back nights.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
A dominant second half (+24) for the Fever in a 108-88 win over the Liberty. Wins on back-to-back nights.

It was the Clark show last night & Mitchell tonight — 33pts, 10/14 FGs and 9/13 FTs. Cunningham & Harris with 11pts off the bench.

Next: Wed. v CON, then ASW

items.title: Hollinger POTD Derek Anderson. Kentucky SG tore ACL as senior but still drafted 13th by CLE in 97. Good athlete but bounced around to LAC & SA before signing big deal w/POR in 01. Peaked at 17 ppg was good when healthy after. Wore down and retired by 08 (age 33).

"He’s given himself a really good chance. He is definitely an NBA player.”

As for the Liberty, just their first game since Sunday.

Fever off. has bright moments, but looks jumbled and unsure at times

(She's getting a celebration by Minnesota postgame)

items.title: Just one play of many in a terrible start for the Fever. It's 15-4 Liberty after under three minutes of play. Timeout Fever.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Just one play of many in a terrible start for the Fever. It's 15-4 Liberty after under three minutes of play. Timeout Fever.

items.title: Caitlin Clark issued a technical foul, her sixth of the season. That's a $1k fine.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Caitlin Clark issued a technical foul, her sixth of the season. That's a $1k fine.

A one-game suspension follows No. 8.
